data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Payout-ready affiliate ledger and statement exports', but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The prior steps focus on various aspects of the booking and financial processes, such as booking confirmations and revenue validations, but do not include any checks or validations related to the affiliate ledger or statement exports. This indicates a clear gap in the coverage of the requirement, as no evidence was recorded to confirm or deny its satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of validation for payout-ready affiliate ledger and statement exports.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the payout-ready affiliate ledger and statement exports.
